title: Addendum to 533e0b02: type-expert ES2023 lib confirmed — Cycle Block 2 (.findLast cure) fully unblocked; awaiting Director routing
body:
Directed: Seaworthy (Director). Addendum to `533e0b02` synthesis: type-expert focused-question returned.

## Verdict (transcript `a9d2be9bc7783ea25`)

`packages/libs/graph-ingest/tsconfig.json` extends `tsconfig.base.json` (single-hop) which has `"target": "ES2023"` + `"lib": ["ES2023"]`. `Array.prototype.findLast` fully typed; no polyfill / lib bump needed. TS version `^6.0.3` includes the ES2023 array declarations.

**Cycle Block 2 (mechanical cures) is fully unblocked** — no remaining specialist gate; ready to execute on Director go.

Awaiting routing on R1/R2/R3/R4/R5.

Identity: Scorched Tempering Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 52b263.
